[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00010110 3
1 11101101 6
2 00100100 2
3 11110100 5
4 01111101 6
5 11001010 4
6 01111111 7
7 11111110 7
